auth.registerSubtitle: No credit card required · Ready in 30 seconds
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: We'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: Check your email for the recovery link.
teach.title: Teach Magic
teach.hint: Correct Magic in your own words. E.g. "this isn't for the island, it's my trading" or "Marina is my girlfriend, not my aunt".
ctx.starterHint: Contexts group your notes by topic. Create one to get started:
sidebar.emptyFavorites: Pin a note with 📌 to see it here
sidebar.removeFavoriteHint: Right-click → Remove from favorites · Drag a task here to move it inside
sidebar.emptyShortcuts: Press 🔖 on any filter or ⭐ on a node to pin it here
topbar.switchToLight: Switch to light mode (⌘⇧S for sidebar)
topbar.switchToDark: Switch to dark mode (⌘⇧S for sidebar)
statusbar.contextBudgetHint: Text injected into Magic for this note: your Profile + the node's context. The less, the cheaper and more focused.
guestBanner.message: You're in guest mode. Your data will be lost when you close the browser.
trialBanner.message: ✦ 7-day free trial · No credit card required
settings.title: Settings
account.title: Account settings
account.privacyDataHint: Your notes are stored locally and on our servers for sync. We never share your data with third parties or use it to train AI models.
account.privacyDataStoredHint: Your notes and tasks are stored locally on your device and, if you have an active account, also on our servers for sync. We never share your data with third parties or use it to train AI models.
account.privacyPolicyHint: Learn how we handle and protect your data.
account.exportDataHint: Download a complete copy of all your data in JSON or Markdown format.
account.exportAllLabel: Export all your notes and tasks
account.exportAllHint: Download a copy of all your data in your preferred format.
account.deleteAccountHint: Irreversible action. All your data will be permanently deleted.
account.deleteAccountHintShort: This action is irreversible. All your data will be deleted.
account.deleteAccountConfirmText: This action will permanently delete your account and all your data. It cannot be undone.
account.cancelConfirm: Cancel your subscription? You'll keep access until the end of the paid period.
account.billingUnavailable: No billing portal available for this account.
appearance.colorModeHint: Choose between light and dark mode.
appearance.fontSizeHint: Adjust the base text size in the app.
appearance.dayStartHint: Earlier hours are hidden in the weekly calendar and daily planner.
appearance.dayEndHint: Later hours are hidden. Default: 7:00 to 23:00.
ai.defaultModelHint: Fromly uses Claude (Anthropic) by default. If you set your own API key below, Fromly will use it and won't consume your included tokens. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google (Gemini).
ai.tokensBalanceLoginHint: Sign in to see your balance.
ai.tokensExplanationHint: Each AI operation consumes tokens from your monthly balance. With an active plan you receive tokens every month. You can add your own API key above to avoid consuming them.
ai.languageHint: Preferred language for AI-generated responses. The AI also detects the language from context.
ai.apiKeyHintPaid: Your {{provider}} key is stored encrypted on the server and synced across devices (Mac, web, iOS).
ai.apiKeyHintFree: Requires a lifetime plan or active subscription.
ai.keyErrorPlan: Requires a lifetime plan or active subscription.
ai.recordingLabel: Recording · press ■ (or release R) to send
ai.holdToTalk: Record (click to start/stop · or hold R)
ai.browserVoiceUnsupported: Your browser does not support voice recognition. Try Chrome or Safari.
magic.autoTitlesHint: Suggests a title when a note reaches a paragraph of content.
magic.autoTagsHint: Detects topics and suggests hashtags when there's enough text.
magic.autoUnfurlHint: When you paste a link, Fromly automatically extracts the title, description, and image.
shortcuts.textExpansionHint: Define shortcuts that expand automatically as you type.
templates.hint: Define templates to create notes with preset content. They appear in the node context menu.
templates.hintModal: Define templates to create notes with preset content. They appear in the new note modal.
google.connectionStatusHint: Connecting Google gives you access to Google Calendar and Google Drive in a single authorization.
google.calendarSyncHint: When Google is connected, your calendar events appear automatically in the Diary Timeline.
google.driveAccessHint: The same authorization allows you to attach files from Google Drive to your notes.
mcp.directoryTitle: Fromly for Claude — now in the directory
mcp.directoryHint: Fromly is in Claude's official connector directory. No need to install anything or copy tokens.
mcp.step1: Open Claude (claude.ai, iPhone, Android or Desktop)
mcp.step4: Sign in with your Fromly account
mcp.step5: Done — Claude can save notes and tasks to your vault from any device
mcp.cliHint: Add Fromly to ~/.claude.json with type http and URL https://from-server-production.up.railway.app/mcp. Get your token from Settings → Accessories.
mcp.accountApiKeyHint: If you want to use your own Anthropic key instead of the tokens included in your plan, you can add it in the desktop app under Settings → AI → API Key. This lets you use your own quota without consuming Fromly's tokens.
export.serverBackupHint: Export a copy of your data stored on the server.
export.localDataHint: Export the data stored in this browser.
import.jsonHint: Upload a JSON file exported from Fromly to import your notes and tasks.
import.formatError: Only JSON format is supported at this time.
import.noteExisting: Existing nodes with the same ID will be updated.
import.noteNew: New nodes will be added to your vault.
import.noteFormat: Files exported from Fromly (JSON) are supported.
stats.completionRateHint: Percentage of tasks done out of the total with a status.
tags.hint: Tags detected in your nodes. They are created automatically by writing #tag in the text.
states.customizationHint: Editing custom states will be available soon. Mac already supports it.
voice.notAvailableHint: Your browser does not support Web Speech API. Try Chrome or Safari.
voice.languageHint: Uses the active language set in Appearance (es or en).
agents.hint: Agents are created with /agent in the editor. Manage and run them here.
agents.noAgentsHint: Create one from the editor by typing /agent.
timeline.startHourHint: First visible hour in the daily timeline.
timeline.endHourHint: Last visible hour in the daily timeline.
prompts.hint: Reusable templates injected when launching inline AI or an agent.
backups.snapshotsHint: The server creates a snapshot of all your nodes every 2 hours if there have been changes. Retention: last 12.
backups.restoreHint: Coming soon: snapshot list with a restore button (already available on Mac).
cmdpalette.collapseAllHintNode: Collapses all children of the current node
cmdpalette.expandAllHintNode: Expands all children of the current node
quickCapture.title: ✎ Quick capture
quickCapture.placeholder: Capture an idea, task, or note...
pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.titleAfterRegister: Account created! Choose how to continue
pricing.subtitle: Start free · Pay once and use Fromly forever
pricing.subtitleLoggedIn: You can use Fromly for free right now. Upgrade whenever you want.
settings.language.hint: Select the interface language. Auto-detected from your browser.
daily.focusHint: Focus works best with 3 or fewer
ai.magicHint: Magic — tell me what you need (⌘J)
ai.loginForChat: Sign in to use AI Chat
ai.chatLoginHint: You need an account to access the assistant.
voice.browserNotSupported: Voice recording requires Chrome or Edge.
panel.convertToContainer: Convert to container note with this task as first step
panel.addAIPrompt: Add AI prompt for this tag
onboarding.promise: ✦ I promise it'll take ONE MINUTE.
onboarding.v2.canvasTextBefore: Everything lives here: notes, tasks, ideas and files. Just
onboarding.v2.canvasTextAfter: anywhere on the canvas and write your first card.
onboarding.v2.magicTitle: Turn text into a task, like magic
onboarding.v2.magicTextBefore: In your card, start a line with a verb and say when. Type “call Marina tomorrow” and press
onboarding.v2.magicHint: Fromly detects it, turns it into a task and sets the date. It shows up in your day automatically.
onboarding.v2.panelTextBefore: Select any card and it opens large on the right to read and edit. From there you can export or publish with
onboarding.v2.everythingText: Drag to move and arrange. Draw with the pen. Drop PDFs, images or links and they become cards.
onboarding.v2.aiTextAfter: and talk to Fromly: create tasks, summarize or plan your week. It acts on your canvas.
onboarding.v2.doneText: You know the essentials. Explore the canvas at your own pace.
files.title: 📎 Files
files.loginRequired: Sign in to access your files.
inbox.emptyHint: Your inbox is empty. All recent notes are organized.
inbox.recentHint: Recent unorganized notes. Review and move them where they belong.

autoCtx.unclassifiedEmpty: All nodes have a context assigned
autoCtx.updateKnowledgeTooltip: Update Fromly summary — extracts keywords, people and topics from this context
prompts.panelHint: Your prompts for Magic. Open them to edit the instructions and choose when they activate.
prompts.starterHint: Create a prompt to start. For example:
prompts.actManualDesc: You choose it in Magic (chip or /).
prompts.actDiaryDesc: Activates when you open Magic from your journal.
prompts.actTaskDesc: Activates when you open Magic from a task.
prompts.variablesHint: Write them in the prompt and Fromly fills them in. Click to copy.
prompts.slashNone: No prompts yet. Create them in the Prompts panel.
agents.panelHint: Your agents. Open them to edit their instructions and configure them.
agents.editHint: Edit the agent's instructions and run it from the central window.
agents.editHintCenter: In the central window you edit the user prompt (what the agent should do).
ctxProps.knowledgeHint: Fromly summarizes the keywords, people and topics of this context to better understand your notes.
prompts.variablesHint2: Write them in the prompt and Fromly fills them in. Click to insert one where your cursor is.
pricing.subtitle2: Start free. Go Pro when your second brain grows.
feedback.tooltip: Tell us about a bug or an idea
feedback.title: We're in beta 🛠️
feedback.subtitle: Fromly still has rough edges. If something breaks or you have an idea, let us know and we'll fix it fast.
feedback.placeholder: Describe the problem or your idea…
feedback.enterHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line
feedback.error: Couldn't send. Please try again in a moment.
feedback.thanksSubtitle: We'll look into it right away.
rec.noAudio: No transcribable audio detected. Check that your microphone is active.

search.syntaxNaturalHint: You can also type natural language: "today's tasks", "overdue", etc.

ctxPanel.knowledgePlaceholder: One line per item. Fromly will fill it in automatically from your note.

tip.allScheduled: All scheduled. Nothing without a date.
tip.dragToCalendar: Drag to the calendar to schedule
tip.rescheduledCount: Rescheduled {{count}} {{count, plural, one {time} other {times}}} — is it real?

tip.deleteArea: Delete area (notes inside return to the note)
tip.dragToCanvas: Drag to the canvas to place it

tip.clickAddUntimed: Click to add a task without a time

claudeConnect.loginBanner: Sign in to Fromly to connect with Claude
claudeConnect.invalidRequestText: Required parameters are missing to complete the authorization.
claudeConnect.connectSubtitle: Claude wants to access your Fromly vault to save notes, tasks and contexts from your conversations.
claudeConnect.permissionRead: Read and create notes and tasks in your vault
claudeConnect.permissionDiary: Access today's diary and the contexts of your areas
claudeConnect.permissionSummaries: Save summaries and transcripts of conversations
claudeConnect.revokeNote: You can revoke this access at any time from Fromly settings.
captureWindow.loginHint: Open the Fromly app and sign in to your account to use quick capture.
onboarding.step0Promise: ✦ I promise it'll take ONE MINUTE.
onboarding.step0TryAgainTextBefore: That node was left unfinished. Write it out fully in a new bullet and press
onboarding.step0Text: This is your note for today, where you'll work every day. Click and type:
onboarding.step0HintBefore: Notice what appears next to the node as you type. Press
onboarding.step0WaitingWrite: Waiting for you to write it…
onboarding.step1TextBefore: The more you use me, the better suggestions I'll make. You can also turn any note into a task with
onboarding.step2TextAfter: You'll see how Fromly filters the nodes instantly.
onboarding.step2Waiting: Waiting for you to use the filter…
onboarding.step3TextAfter: that appears to the left of the “Start using Fromly” node. You can create infinite levels.
onboarding.step3Hint: ✦ The dot appears when you hover over the node.
onboarding.step4TextBefore: I just opened it on the right. Magic knows your notes and can create, organize and complete things for you. Open it whenever you want with the
onboarding.step5TextBefore: I've already prepared something for you. Just press
onboarding.step5TextAfter: and I'll see what I can do.
onboarding.step5PromptPreview: Add 3 child tasks to this node: Explore the outliner, Try the filter and Set up my Fromly profile
onboarding.step5Waiting: Waiting for you to confirm the actions…
onboarding.step6Text: You've just created your first content with AI. There's much more to discover.
account.deleteConfirmPasswordPrompt: Type your password to confirm the deletion of your account:
account.deleteConfirmEmailPrompt: Type your email to confirm the deletion of your account:
account.gcalStep3: Events with a date and time will be imported automatically into the Calendar.
account.mcpConnectHint: Connect Claude with your vault. Install the extension and generate your token.
account.mcpTokenStepLabel: API token — paste it into Claude Desktop when installing the extension
account.mcpStep2TextBefore: Copy the following block and paste it into
account.mcpStep2Path: Claude Desktop → Settings → Profile → Custom instructions
account.mcpStep2TextAfter: Do it once and Claude will save your conversations to Fromly automatically.
account.mcpInstructionsCopied: ✓ Copied — paste it into Claude Desktop → Settings → Profile
taskPropsModal.title: Task properties
settingsModal.apiTokenHint: A single key to connect Fromly with Raycast, Chrome and Claude Code. Don't share it.
settingsModal.menuBarHintPre: Fromly lives in the Mac menu bar: click the icon (or
settingsModal.menuBarHintPost: ) opens a floating window to create something on the fly. Closing the main window doesn't quit Fromly.
settingsModal.showTrayIcon: Show icon in the menu bar
settingsModal.showTrayIconHint: You can also hide it from the icon itself (right-click → Hide).
settingsModal.icloudAutoCopyHint: Every ~2h, a copy of your vault in iCloud Drive ("From Backups" folder), in addition to the server backup.
settingsModal.appleShortcutHint: It asks for the text and saves it to your note for today. Then assign it a global key from Shortcuts → Shortcut settings.
settingsModal.raycastHint: Create, search and open your note for today from Raycast. When installing it, paste your token (above) into its preferences.
settingsModal.chromeHint: Save the current page to your note for today and send selected text as a node. Paste your token into its options.
settingsModal.claudeHintPost: : open Claude → Connectors → search for Fromly and connect with one click. No tokens or setup. Works on Claude Desktop, Claude.ai and Claude Code.
import.importedNotes: Imported {{count}} notes. You'll find them in "📥 Imported…" (in your tree).
import.footerHint: Imported content is created in a "📥 Imported [date]" node in your tree, so you can review and reorganize it at your own pace. It doesn't touch your current notes.
import.stepObsidian1: On your computer, locate your Obsidian vault folder.
import.stepObsidian2: Click "Upload folder" and select it. The subfolder structure is preserved.
import.stepNotion1: In Notion: ··· (top right) → Export → "Markdown & CSV" format, with "Include subpages".
import.stepNotion3: Click "Upload folder" and choose the unzipped folder.
import.stepApple1: Apple Notes doesn't export to Markdown directly.
import.stepApple2: Convert them to .txt/.md files (with an Apple Shortcut "Export notes", or by copying the text).
import.stepMarkdown1: Select one or more .md or .txt files (or a whole folder).
import.stepFrom1: Select the .json file exported from Fromly (Settings → Export).
outliner.emptyHint: Click here or press Enter to start writing
outliner.emptyHintCommands: / for commands · # for tags · @ for mentions
outliner.recBadgeTitle: Repeats every {{rec}} · right-click or × to remove
outliner.mirrorHint: Mirror — select the node to reflect here
nodeRightPanel.syncedHint: ↑ Changes synced automatically with Google Calendar
nodeRightPanel.confirmDeleteEventGcal: It will also be removed from Google Calendar.
nodeRightPanel.promptPropType: Type (text / number / select / date / checkbox / url / tag):
nodeRightPanel.propsEmpty: No properties. Create the first with ＋ — it will also appear in the parent table.
nodeRightPanel.dateRequired: The date is required to create the event
noteColumn.movedEmpty: Move nodes to this note and they will appear here.
template.autoApplyOn: Each new day starts with this template.
template.autoApplyOff: Apply this template when creating the day's note.
template.recurringDesc: Insert as a section on specific days (each week, month…).
template.contentHint: The content is edited in the center window, as bullets, like any note. What you put inside is what gets copied when applied.
template.modalHint: Fromly will insert this template as a section inside that day's note (it does not replace the day).
hotkeys.newTodayDesc: Go to today's journal and create an empty node
hotkeys.toggleFilterDesc: Open / close the global filter panel (⌘F)
hotkeys.toggleMagicDesc: Open / close the Magic Chat AI assistant
hotkeys.toggleRecorderDesc: Open / close the voice recording panel
hotkeys.escapeUpDesc: Escape: close modals → clear focus → move up a level
hotkeys.newSiblingDesc: Create a node at the same position (same level)
hotkeys.indentDesc: Make it a child of the previous node
hotkeys.slashMenuDesc: Open the / menu to change node type
hotkeys.boldDesc: Apply / remove bold on selected text
recording.notSupported: Your browser doesn't support voice recording. Use Chrome.
common.title: Title
resourcesView.emptyHint: Paste a URL as a note title, or use the 🔗 Resource button in the right panel.
resourcesView.noTagsHint: Resources without tags will appear here
settingsView.magicKnowledgeHint: Fromly learns durable facts about you (people, goals, situation) from your notes and conversations, and saves them here on its own. It also learns from what you teach it (right-click → Teach Magic).
settingsView.magicNothingLearned: It hasn't learned any new facts yet.
settingsView.magicOpenHint: Open it to review and edit it in bullets, like any note. Cleanup is automatic.
settingsView.magicContextHint: For each context, Fromly keeps a summary (keywords, people, topics) that updates itself as you use it.
settingsView.plannerColorHint: Base color for planner tasks and events (shown in pastel).
settingsView.mainColorHint: Color used for buttons, selections and active elements.
settingsView.snapshotsIntro: Every 2h a full copy of your vault is saved. We keep the last 12 snapshots. Mac and web share the same snapshots — you can restore from any device.
settingsView.confirmRestore:
Restore the vault to the snapshot from {{date}}?

A safety snapshot of the current state will be created before restoring, so you can undo it.
settingsView.noSnapshots: No snapshots yet. Create one with the button above or wait for the automatic cron.
ai.micDenied: Couldn't access the microphone. Check permissions.
ai.transcribeFailed: Couldn't transcribe the audio. Try again.
pricing.subtitleFree: Go Pro whenever you need it
prompts.varCopied: {{v}} copied — paste it into the prompt
globalCanvas.emptyHint: A single plane for everything. Place your areas and move between them with the camera. It's reversible: removing from the canvas deletes nothing.
globalCanvas.placeAreas: Place my areas on the canvas
tip.confirmRestoreClean: Restore the PDF without annotations? This can't be undone.
elements.title: Elements
export.textsOnlyLabel: Export all your texts and notes
export.textsOnlyHint: A single Markdown file with all your notes and documents, to review and keep what you want. Does NOT include tasks or contexts — those stay as they are.
v2Onboarding.welcomeText: You're no longer organizing a canvas — you're talking to your second brain. Write what you need and the AI creates tasks, notes and events for you.
v2Onboarding.contextsText: Every area or project in your life lives in the sidebar. Pick one or create your own to start organizing your conversations.
v2Onboarding.chatExample: remind me to call Ana on Monday
v2Onboarding.chatTextAfter: and hit Enter. The AI creates the task for you.
v2Onboarding.rightText: Context (what the AI knows about this topic), Elements (all your content), History (your conversations) and Today (your agenda) — switch between them at the top.
v2Onboarding.filesTitle: Upload a file and ask about it
v2Onboarding.filesText: Drag a PDF, an image or a note into the conversation. Fromly indexes it so you can ask about its content, highlight it or crop a region.
v2Onboarding.doneText: Explore the manual or the blog whenever you want to go deeper.
v2.chat.composerHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line · drag files here
v2.chat.emptyHint: Talk to Fromly. Ask it about everything you save, create notes and tasks, or upload files by dragging them here.
v2.chat.suggestOrganizePrompt: Help me organize and prioritize my pending tasks.
v2.chat.suggestSearchNotesPrompt: Search my notes for what I know about
v2.chat.suggestSummarizeDayPrompt: What do I have today? Summarize my tasks and events.
v2.templates.emptyHint: You don't have any templates yet. Create one to reuse content when opening new notes.
v2.classicNoteFormat: This note uses the classic format (lists).
v2.context.confirmMigrate:
Convert {{count}} old note(s) in this context into a document?

This is reversible: the originals go to the trash.
v2.context.convertLegacyNotes: Convert {{count}} old note(s) into a document
v2.context.knowledgePlaceholder: Describe this context so Fromly understands it better… (Fromly also fills it in on its own)
v2.context.removeFromTree: Remove from the tree (still searchable and in RAG)
v2.convertFailed: Couldn't convert: it contains something that can't be migrated (check its content).
v2.detachedFromConversation: Removed from the conversation (still in Fromly)
v2.filesIncorporatedNotice: I've added {{label}} to this conversation. You can now ask me about its content.
v2.noContextsYet: You don't have any contexts yet. Create them in v1 and they'll show up here.
v2.noElementsYet: No elements yet. Ask Fromly for a note, a document, or upload files.
v2.outlinerPlaceholder: Type here… (use “/” to insert a table, kanban, calendar…)
v2.rightColumn.chooseContextEmpty: Choose a context on the left, or start a conversation: you'll see its tasks and elements here.
v2.rightColumn.contextNoContentYet: This context has no conversations or content yet.
v2.rightColumn.nothingYet: There's nothing yet. Start talking to Fromly.
v2.trash.confirmEmpty: Empty the trash? {{count}} element(s) will be permanently deleted. This can't be undone.
v2.trash.title: Trash
